code_value: A friend in need is a friend indeed. Friendship is one of the most important things in life. It's like a warm hug on a cold day. Friends bring happiness to our lives. They are the people we share both good and bad experiences with. When you have friends, you never feel alone. You can play together, share toys and games, and have a lot of fun. Everyone needs friends in their life, and true friends are always there for each other.
